zh.Isles-sur-Suippe, Marne, Champagne-Arden: 法國哈帕格-亞登芒內易斯萊-素-素普
zh.South Petherton, Somerset, England: 英國薩默塞特素斯 瑟頓
zh.South Ingleby, Lincolnshire, England: 英國林可爾史爾素斯 英格萊比
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny於1304年3月3日出生在英國薩默塞特素斯 瑟頓時，他的父親Sir Helias De Aubeney43歲，母親Joan de Guernsey37歲。他於1333年1月27日與Alice Montacute在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1303年住在根西島。他去世於1378年2月之後在英國薩默塞特素斯 瑟頓。

zh-hans.Isles-sur-Suippe, Marne, Champagne-Arden: 法国哈帕格-亞登芒內易斯萊-素-素普
zh-hans.South Petherton, Somerset, England: 英国薩默塞特素斯 瑟頓
zh-hans.South Ingleby, Lincolnshire, England: 英国林可爾史爾素斯 英格萊比
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny于1304年3月3日出生在英国薩默塞特素斯 瑟頓时，他的父亲Sir Helias De Aubeney43岁，母亲Joan de Guernsey37岁。他于1333年1月27日与Alice Montacute在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1303年住在根西岛。他去世于1378年2月之后在英国薩默塞特素斯 瑟頓。

nameMeanings.name: d'Aubeney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Daubney
meanings: English (mainly Lincolnshire; of Norman origin): habitational name for someone from any of several places in northern France called Aubigny, named with the Gallo-Roman personal name Albinius (a derivative of Latin albus ‘white’; compare Albin ) + the habitational suffix -acum. Compare Dabney .

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny was born on 3 March 1304, in South Petherton, Somerset, England, his father, Sir Helias De Aubeney, was 43 and his mother, Joan de Guernsey, was 37. He married Alice Montacute on 27 January 1333, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He lived in Guernsey in 1303. He died after February 1378, in South Petherton, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny est né le 3 mars 1304, à South Petherton, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Sir Helias De Aubeney, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Joan de Guernsey, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Alice Montacute le 27 janvier 1333, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il a vécu à Guernesey en 1303. Il est décédé après février 1378, à South Petherton, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny am 3. März 1304 in South Petherton, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Helias De Aubeney 43 und seine Mutter Joan de Guernsey 37. Er hat am 27. Januar 1333 in England Alice Montacute geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1303 hat er in Guernsey gelebt. Er starb nach Februar 1378 in South Petherton, Somerset, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny è nato il il 3 marzo 1304 nel South Petherton, Somerset, England, il suo padre, Sir Helias De Aubeney, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Guernsey, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Alice Montacute il 27 gennaio 1333, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Vissuto a Guernsey nel 1303. Morì dopo il febbraio 1378, nel South Petherton, Somerset, England.

ja.Northamptonshire, England: イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイア
ja.Lincolnshire, England: イギリスリンコルンシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubenyが1304年3月3日にイギリスソメルセトソウス ペスエルトンで生まれた時，父Sir Helias De Aubeneyは43歳，母Joan de Guernseyは37歳であった。1333年1月27日にイギリスでAlice Montacuteと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1303年にはガーンジーに住んでいた。彼は1378年2月以後にイギリスソメルセトソウス ペスエルトンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny(이)가 1304년 3월 3일 영국 서머세트 소우스 페더턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Helias De Aubeney(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Guernsey(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1333년 1월 27일 영국에서 Alice Montacute(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1303년도에 건지에서 살았다. 그는 1378년 2월 이후 영국 서머세트 소우스 페더턴에서 사망했다.

mn.3 March 1304–after February 1378: 1304 оны Гуравдугаар сарын 3–1378 оны Хоёрдугаар сараас хойш
mn.South Petherton, Somerset, England: South Petherton, Bro an Hañv, Английн

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny nasceu em 3 de março de 1304, em South Petherton, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Helias De Aubeney, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Guernsey, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Montacute em 27 de janeiro de 1333, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele viveu em Guernsey em 1303. Ele faleceu após fevereiro de 1378, em South Petherton, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny родился 3 марта 1304 г. в местности соут петиртон, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Helias De Aubeney было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Joan de Guernsey, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Montacute 27 января 1333 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он жил в местности Гернси в 1303 году. Он умер после февраль 1378 г. в местности соут петиртон, сомирсет, Англия.

es.3 March 1304–after February 1378: 3 de marzo de 1304–después de febrero de 1378
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny nació el 3 de marzo de 1304, en South Petherton, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Helias De Aubeney, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Joan de Guernsey, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Alice Montacute el 27 de enero de 1333, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Vivió en Guernsey en 1303. Murió después de febrero de 1378, en South Petherton, Somerset, Inglaterra.
